title: Echo Pickaxe
description: Never miss a hidden diamond or netherite again! Mining emits a glowing echo that reveals diagonal and adjacent ores in the same vein. 💎⛏️
body:
# Echo Pickaxe

Stop leaving valuable ores behind! Echo Pickaxe is a highly customizable, vanilla-friendly mining utility. When you mine an ore, your pickaxe emits a glowing echo wave that briefly reveals hidden, diagonal, and adjacent ores of the same type in the dark. 

![Hidden Vein Reveal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xW5gGRnU/images/ebcbd81cf0ea45dd1e9ff15799f0acb27227929f.gif)

Never miss a hidden diamond or leave Ancient Debris buried in the netherrack again. 💎🔥

## Key Features

* **Smart Echo Wave:** Automatically detects and highlights matching ores nearby using a smooth glowing effect.
* **Subtle Feedback:** Emits a soft amethyst resonance sound and magical vanilla particles when new hidden ores are discovered. ✨
* **Netherite Hunting:** Works perfectly in the Nether, making the search for Ancient Debris much less frustrating.

![Netherite Hunting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xW5gGRnU/images/f911f50c60d4ee6b3536105fb43f977ab6e78ab0.gif)

## Seamless Compatibility

The scanner is smart. It natively understands the difference between stone and deepslate, linking standard and deepslate ore variants together in the same echo wave without breaking immersion. 🪨🔗

![Seamless Ore Variants](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xW5gGRnU/images/0975b1d4d67e45743052991f0cddaa4836e71b99_350.webp)

It natively supports all Overworld and Nether ores out of the box. Playing with modpacks? No problem! It automatically supports modded ores using the standard forge/fabric ore tags. 🌍

## Fully Customizable

Echo Pickaxe respects your playstyle and server balance. Everything is configurable via an intuitive in-game menu (requires Cloth Config and ModMenu). ⚙️

![Echo Pickaxe Menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c56674b34b30e9d876f44a1beabd9347b3e21989_0.webp)

* **Activation State:** Set the mod to be always active, disabled, or only trigger when you are sneaking. Keep your screen clean when mining huge veins! 🤫
* **Pickaxe Whitelist:** Choose exactly which pickaxe tiers (Wood, Stone, Iron, Gold, Diamond, Netherite) are allowed to trigger the echo. 🪓
* **Enchantment Requirements:** Balance the mod for your survival world by requiring Fortune III, Efficiency V, or Silk Touch to use the echo wave. 📖✨
* **Radius & Duration:** Adjust how far the echo travels and how long the glow lasts.

![Sneak to Activate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xW5gGRnU/images/467c6bd44327e241c397be8f707eb014e966a9a9.gif)

## Dependencies

To run this mod, make sure you have the following installed:
* **Fabric API** (Required)
* **Cloth Config API** (Required)
* **ModMenu** (Highly Recommended to access the settings screen)

---
*Happy mining, and never leave a diamond behind!*
